---

Middesk was founded in 2018 in San Francisco and focuses specifically on business verification for US use cases. The platform pulls from secretaries of state, IRS records, and other US registries to return structured data on a business — legal name, EIN, officers, addresses, registration status, ownership.

The customer base is heavy in US fintechs, payment processors, banking-as-a-service providers, and B2B SaaS companies onboarding business customers. Pricing is published as tiered plans with custom enterprise contracts on top. Middesk leans KYB-only; you're not buying it for consumer identity verification.
